diagrams.title: ARM Register Organization
diagrams.description: Shows 16 general-purpose registers and special registers (PC, LR, SP, CPSR)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding register layout and special register functions in ARM architecture

diagrams.title: ARM Pipeline Stages (ARM7)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how pipelining improves instruction throughput in ARM processors

diagrams.title: ARM Privilege Modes
diagrams.description: Seven processor modes with their hierarchy and transitions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception and interrupt handling modes in ARM

diagrams.title: Load-Store Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how data flows between memory and registers through LDR/STR
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental ARM design where arithmetic operations only work on registers
